content: Hi, I'm Skyler, and I'm thinking of planning a trip to Australia. I've always wanted to visit the Sydney Opera House and try some authentic Aussie barbie.
That sounds like a great idea! What made you decide to visit Australia now?
Well, I've been working as a Podcast Host covering true crime, and I needed a break. I'm also finishing up my part-time MBA, and I want to celebrate when I'm done.
Congratulations on your MBA! What kind of true crime stories do you like to cover on your podcast?
I mostly focus on famous murder cases and interview experts in the field. I also like to share my passion for hiking and tennis on my free time.
That's really cool! I've always been interested in hiking. Do you have a favorite type of trail to hike?
Yeah, I love hiking in the mountains! It's so much fun to challenge myself and try to reach the summit. By the way, have you ever been to the Great Barrier Reef? I've heard it's incredible.
Yes, I've heard great things about it too! You should definitely check it out. What do you think about trying some snorkeling or scuba diving while you're in Australia?
Actually, I've always wanted to try it! Maybe I'll find a new hobby. My friend, Alex, recommended this one dive site that's supposed to be amazing.
That sounds like a lot of fun! I'm sure you'll have a great time. What's your favorite type of food to try while you're traveling?
I love trying new types of seafood! I've been wanting to try some authentic fish and chips.
That sounds delicious! I'm sure you'll find plenty of great restaurants to try. Do you have any plans to visit any of the famous landmarks in Australia?
Yeah, definitely! I want to visit the Uluru rock and try to watch the sunset over the monolith. I've also been wanting to visit the Blue Mountains and go hiking.
That sounds like a great plan! I'm sure you'll have a wonderful time. What's your favorite type of music to listen to while you're traveling?
I love listening to indie rock! It's so much fun to discover new bands and artists. I've been listening to a lot of Tame Impala lately.
That's great! I'm sure it will be a good accompaniment to your travels. Have you thought about visiting any of the local festivals or events while you're in Australia?
Actually, I've been thinking about visiting the Sydney Festival. I've heard it's an amazing event with so much to see and do.
That's a great choice! I'm sure you'll have a fantastic time. Don't forget to try some of the local vegemite while you're there!

Will do! Thanks for chatting with me, I'm feeling more excited than ever for my trip. It's going to be on November 15th, and I'll be there for 10 days. I'll be staying in Salt Lake City, UT, for a few days before I leave to get some work done.
You're welcome! I'm sure you'll have a great time in Australia. Don't forget to pack your hiking boots and tennis racket!
